title: NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) — Splunk SOAR + ISE Mean-Time-to-Contain (MTTC) KPI Evidence
evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) tagging.

compliance.assurance_rationale: NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) requires evidence of incident handling — including quantitative KPIs. UC-17.1.82 produces machine-attested MTTC measurements.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate quantitative MTTC for automated containment workflows that span Splunk SOAR and Cisco ISE.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.2.59' archiving MTTC measurements to `audit_evidence` with `nis2_clause=Art.21(2)(b)`.

controlTest.positiveScenario: SOAR runs `block_endpoint` playbook. ISE 86001 within 30s. Healthy KPI.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Slow MTTC. Evidence captured for remediation.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk SOAR + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=phantom action_name=block_endpoint earliest=-1d
| eval soar_apply_time=_time
| stats earliest(soar_apply_time) as soar_t by container_id, mac_address
| join mac_address [search index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode=86001 anc_action=quarantine | rename _time as ise_apply_time]
| eval mttc_seconds=ise_apply_time - soar_t
| stats avg(mttc_seconds) as avg_mttc, max(mttc_seconds) as max_mttc, count
| eval nis2_clause="Art.21(2)(b)", control="MTTC_KPI"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) MTTC KPI via SOAR-ISE measurements.
value: Quantitative MTTC is the hard NIS2 evidence — it shifts the audit from 'we have an IR plan' to 'we executed containment in N seconds'.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for NIS2 quarterly review.

references.title: UC-17.1.82 — Splunk SOAR + ISE Closed-Loop Playbook Audit

knownFalsePositives: 1. SOAR action retries cause double counts.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.82 operational.
- Splunk SOAR 6.x+.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.2.59: NIS2 — MTTC KPI Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.2.59,reg=NIS2,clause=Art.21(2)(b)
```
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) MTTC KPI via SOAR-ISE measurements. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.
